features.name: Remove Session Handoff
features.behavior: Use feature_list.json and progress.md as the only current State surfaces, with no session-handoff file, Creator option, manifest field, or compatibility path.

steps: node --test packages/harness-core/test/*.test.mjs tests/harness-creator/*.test.mjs tests/harness-doctor/*.test.mjs tests/harness-archiver/*.test.mjs tests/harness-product/*.test.mjs tests/field-validation/*.test.mjs
